com.mentor.chs.api.define

Interface IXPlatformArchitectureDesign

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IXDesign, IXEngineeringChangeOrderAssociatable, IXObject, IXWriteableObject

    public interface IXPlatformArchitectureDesign
extends IXDesign
    Interface representing a platform architecture design.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      java.util.Set<? extends IXFunctionDesign> getAssociatedFunctionalDesigns()
      Get list of system functional designs associated with this platform design.
      java.util.Set<? extends IXCarrier> getCarriers()
      Get the carriers that are present on this design.
      java.util.Set<? extends IXComponent> getComponents()
      Get the components that are present on this design.
      java.util.Set<? extends IXPathwayBreak> getPathwayBreaks()
      Get the pathway breaks that are present on this design.
      java.util.Set<? extends IXComponentPathway> getPathways()
      Get the component pathways that are present on this design.
      java.util.Set<? extends IXFunctionSignal> getSignals()
      Get the signals that are present on this design.

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.api.IXDesign

        getConnectivity, getDiagrams, getEffectivityRanges, getFullScaleDiagrams, getOptions, getScopeCodes, getScopeScodes

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.api.IXWriteableObject

        getAttributeSetter

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.api.IXObject

        getAttribute, getAttributes, getBaseID, getID, getParentID, getProperties, getProperty, getSymbol, toHTML, toHTML

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.api.IXEngineeringChangeOrderAssociatable

        getAllRelatedEngineeringChangeOrders

    • Method Detail

      • getComponents

        java.util.Set<? extends IXComponent> getComponents()
        Get the components that are present on this design.
        Returns:
        A Set of Components that are present on this design if there are any, an empty Set otherwise.
        See Also:
        IXComponent

      • getPathways

        java.util.Set<? extends IXComponentPathway> getPathways()
        Get the component pathways that are present on this design.
        Returns:
        A Set of component pathways that are present on this design if there are any, an empty Set otherwise.
        See Also:
        IXComponentPathway

      • getPathwayBreaks

        java.util.Set<? extends IXPathwayBreak> getPathwayBreaks()
        Get the pathway breaks that are present on this design.
        Returns:
        A Set of pathway breaks that are present on this design if there are any, an empty Set otherwise.
        See Also:
        IXPathwayBreak

      • getSignals

        java.util.Set<? extends IXFunctionSignal> getSignals()
        Get the signals that are present on this design. This method returns all platform specific signals, including ground signals
        Returns:
        A Set of signals that are present on this design if there are any, an empty Set otherwise.
        See Also:
        IXFunctionSignal

      • getCarriers

        java.util.Set<? extends IXCarrier> getCarriers()
        Get the carriers that are present on this design.
        Returns:
        A Set of carriers that are present on this design if there are any, an empty Set otherwise.
        See Also:
        IXCarrier

      • getAssociatedFunctionalDesigns

        java.util.Set<? extends IXFunctionDesign> getAssociatedFunctionalDesigns()
        Get list of system functional designs associated with this platform design.
        Returns:
        A Set of functional designs associated with this platform designs. An empty Set is returned if there are none.
